nasb.text: Then God said, “Let there be lights in the expanse of the heavens to separate the day from the night, and let them be for signs and for seasons and for days and years;

esv.text: And God said, “Let there be lights in the expanse of the heavens to separate the day from the night. And let them be for signs and for seasons, and for days and years,

cnv.text: 神說：“在天上穹蒼中，要有光體來分晝夜；這些光體要作為記號，定節令、日子和年歲；

ccb.text: 上帝说：“天空要有光体，以区分昼夜，作记号，定节令，计算年日，

csbs.text: 神说：“让天上的穹苍中有光体来分昼夜，让它们成为标记来定时节、日子和年岁；
